name: NBM Forum App
summary: Mobile forum application designed and built independently during internship work.
description: Solely designed and built a mobile forum app using Expo and React Native with TypeScript, including component architecture, navigation flow, and API integration in a production environment.
impact: Delivered end-to-end ownership from architecture to implementation for internship product modules.

name: PokéPokédex
summary: Interactive Pokédex web app with server-rendered pages and live API data.
description: Developed a Pokédex web app using Next.js and React with TypeScript, integrating live data from PokéAPI and deploying on Vercel with server-side rendering for responsive data loading.
impact: Shipped a complete full-stack portfolio project with production deployment and real-time data integration.
